tips: A lane counter against your direct opponent matters more than a champion's overall win rate.
Don't stack one damage type: mix physical and magic, or one enemy item shuts down half your team.
Your team needs a frontline — someone has to start fights and absorb damage.
Pick comfort: a champion you know is usually stronger than an unfamiliar counter.
Against poke you need engage and mobility; against dive — peel and cc for your carry.
Last pick is an advantage: tailor it to the enemy comp already revealed.
Bans remove either the strongest in the patch or whatever is hardest for you.
Synergy wins teamfights: lockdown+burst catch a target, engage+peel keep the carry alive.
Found a bug or have a suggestion? Tell us via Support on the site — counterplays.com/support.

ready.f1body: Computes counters against enemies, synergy with allies and who to ban — from real current-patch stats. Updates on every hover.
ready.f2body: Front-to-back ✊ beats dive ✌, dive beats pick-poke ✋, and pick-poke beats front-to-back. Pick a comp that counters the enemy.
ready.f3body: Factors in your mastery — comfort champions first, no blind counter-picks.

tip.pin: Pin to the right edge of the client

status.connLost: Connection lost, waiting for the client to restart…
status.waitNextDraft: Waiting for the next champ select…

draft.pickHint: ⚠ You pick before the enemies — a counter is possible. Take a neutral pick or swap with someone whose opponent is already locked.

airborne.a: {0} knocks enemies airborne — that triggers your ultimate, hitting the whole knocked-up team at once.
airborne.b: You knock enemies airborne and {0} instantly ults into all of them — a powerful teamfight combo.

orianna.a: Put your ball on {0}: when they engage, your ultimate pulls in and detonates every enemy around them.
orianna.b: You engage first and {0} puts the ball on you, ulting to gather enemies around you — huge AoE damage.

immortal.a: Your ultimate makes {0} invulnerable — they can dive into the enemy and survive.
immortal.b: {0}'s ultimate makes you invulnerable or saves you from death — dive in more boldly.

enchanter.a: {0} deals huge damage but is fragile and immobile. You shield/heal and speed them up — that's when they shine.
enchanter.b: You're a strong but fragile carry. {0} shields, heals and buffs you — stay close and deal damage safely.

hook.a: You hook an enemy out of position and {0} instantly finishes the caught target with burst.
hook.b: {0} hooks and pulls an enemy out — you finish the caught target with your damage. Easy kills in lane.

burst_pick.a: {0} locks a target with cc (charm/stun/root) — you delete it with burst in a second while it's immobilized.
burst_pick.b: You lock an enemy with cc and {0} instantly bursts the held target down. A guaranteed pick on isolated targets.

isolate.a: Your ultimate dives and isolates a target in darkness — {0} finishes it off while its allies are cut off.
isolate.b: {0} ults in and isolates a single target — you back them up with damage and finish the victim.

artillery.a: You and {0} shoot the enemy from long range — a strong poke-and-siege duo for objectives.

channel.a: While {0} holds enemies in place with cc, you get to channel your whole ultimate onto them.
channel.b: You hold enemies with cc while {0} channels a powerful ultimate onto the stationary targets — big damage.

peel.a: {0} is your team's main damage but vulnerable. You peel enemies off so they can deal damage safely in fights.

frontline.a: You start fights and lock enemies with cc, protecting {0}, who deals damage from range.
frontline.b: {0} starts fights and locks enemies with cc — meanwhile you deal damage safely from the backline.

double_engage.a: You and {0} both engage and lock enemies with cc — together you easily catch isolated targets and win picks.

airborne.name: Ult combo: knock-up → Yasuo/Yone
airborne.desc: A knock-up activates Yasuo/Yone's ultimate on the whole grouped team.
airborne.tipAlly: Engage with a knock-up — Yasuo/Yone ult in right after. Hit them while grouped.
airborne.tipEnemy: Don't group up or get caught by a knock-up — it's their wombo-combo trigger. Keep spread and cleanse (Mercurial, QSS).

orianna.name: Ball lightning (Orianna + engage)
orianna.desc: Ball on the engager: they dive, Orianna ults to pull in and blow up the whole group.
orianna.tipAlly: Put the ball on the diving engager and follow up right after their engage.
orianna.tipEnemy: Watch who has Orianna's ball — the engage comes on them. Spread out before they initiate.

immortal.name: Immortality (protective ult + dive)
immortal.desc: An invulnerability/save ult lets the carry dive into the middle without risking death.
immortal.tipAlly: Dive aggressively — save the protective ult for the carry's damage peak.
immortal.tipEnemy: Don't waste your focus while their invulnerability is up — wait it out, then kill the carry.

enchanter.name: Hypercarry buff (enchanter + carry)
enchanter.desc: Attack/move-speed buffs and shields turn an immobile carry into a damage machine.
enchanter.tipAlly: Stick to the carry, buff and peel for them — they're your main damage.
enchanter.tipEnemy: Kill the carry fast or get on their backline: without the enchanter they're helpless. Choke them in lane.

hook.name: Hook pick
hook.desc: A hook rips a target out of position; burst champions finish it before help arrives.
hook.tipAlly: Look for hooks on isolated targets — instantly focus the caught one as a team.
hook.tipEnemy: Don't walk alone and keep distance from hook champions. Respect river vision.

aoe.name: Teamfight ults (double AoE)
aoe.desc: Several strong AoE ults stack and wipe a grouped team at once.
aoe.tipAlly: Start fights in chokepoints when both ults are up — land them on the enemy group.
aoe.tipEnemy: Don't stack up or push into chokepoints when their ults are up. Split and enter one at a time.

burstPick.name: Burst pick (cc → delete)
burstPick.desc: An enemy is caught by cc (charm/stun/root) and instantly deleted by burst before they can react.
burstPick.tipAlly: Hunt isolated targets: one locks them with cc, the rest focus and delete in a second.
burstPick.tipEnemy: Don't walk alone, keep vision and save your dash/QSS for their initiator — they'll unload all burst on whoever's caught.

artillery.name: Artillery (long range)
artillery.desc: Several long-range champions push the lane and objectives from afar without trading.
artillery.tipAlly: Poke the enemy down from range before fights and siege objectives — don't go melee first.
artillery.tipEnemy: Don't sit in the poke: engage fast or flank, take shields/mobility and force close-range fights.

global.name: Global pressure
global.desc: Global ults provide help and picks across the map — strong pressure in split-push.
global.tipAlly: Pressure in split and take cross-map picks with globals — stretch the enemy.
global.tipEnemy: Don't overstay in 4v5 skirmishes — their globals even the numbers. Respect when their champs are off the map.

reason.neutral: Neutral pick — safe until the enemy comp is clear.
reason.dmgStack: Team already stacks {0} damage — one armor/MR item shuts down several.
reason.antiDive: Protects the team from their dive (peel/disengage).
reason.vulnNearAll: one item shuts down almost the whole team
reason.vuln3: one item shuts down three at once
reason.vuln2: one item shuts down two at once
reason.exploit: Enemy stacked {0} — you punish their forced item.
reason.jgSetup: Jungler {0} is aggressive without cc — you provide gank setup.
reason.adcEngage: ADC {0} wants engage — you open fights for them.
reason.adcScale: ADC {0} scales — your peel/enchant lets them scale up.
reason.comfortHigh: You play this champion a lot — a confident comfort pick.
reason.comfortMid: A familiar champion from your pool — a comfortable choice.
reason.fitsTeam: Fits well with your current team composition.
reason.baseTop: One of the strongest this patch — WR {0}%
reason.baseLow: Low WR {0}% — you need to know the champion
